title: Count number of subarrays with the given xor K

content.problemStatement:
You are given an array of integers arrarrarr and a target integer targetXORtargetXORtargetXOR. Your task is to compute the total number of **contiguous subarrays** whose **XOR of all elements equals targetXORtargetXORtargetXOR**.

**Function Declaration****Function Name**countSubarraysWithXORcountSubarraysWithXORcountSubarraysWithXOR – Counts the number of contiguous subarrays whose XOR equals the target value.

**Parameters**
arrarrarr : A list/array of integers.
kkk : An integer representing the target XOR value.
**Return Value**
Returns an **integer** — 

the number of contiguous subarrays whose XOR is exactly equal to kkk.
Constraints:
1≤arr.length≤1051 \leq arr.length \leq 10^51≤arr.length≤105
0≤arr[i]≤1090 \leq arr[i] \leq 10^90≤arr[i]≤109
0≤targetXOR≤1090 \leq targetXOR \leq 10^90≤targetXOR≤109

Input Format


TTT → number of test cases




For each test case:



Line 1 → nnn (array size) and kkk (target XOR)
Line 2 → **n integers** representing the array




Output Format
One number per test case.
